name: Cre-ol=e9 Spicy
recipeInstructions:
All herbs and spices are dried. Add parsley for color. Include fresh cilantro during cooking, or a pinch of red (hot) pepper flakes as desired. Yield: 2/3 cup. Rub onto meat before grilling. Additional ideas: Mexican Rice, Ranch salad, Avocado, Potato skins, Torilla crisps, French fries.
Schilling's Seasoned Pepper is a blend of ground black pepper, ground dried sweet bell pepper (red and green), and salt. Alternatively, use a commercial Creole-Cajun blend, adding sugar and cinnamon. Aspartame stores longer and remains in solution better.
